configuration.notes: Live smoke test only; not part of the primary comparison.

reviewers.title: Unauthorized team invitation creation
reviewers.description: The patch creates a new invites route but authorizes by checking membership only. It does not verify that the requester is a team administrator as required by REQ-AUTH-1. Any member (non-admin) could pass the 403 check if membership exists, or potential gaps in admin verification could allow invitation creation.

reviewers.title: Authorization check missing for invite creation
reviewers.description: The patch adds a new route that creates invites but relies on a membership check that may not verify the requester is a team administrator. It checks for membership existence but does not ensure the user has an administrator role or permissions required to create invitations, which violates REQ-AUTH-1: Only team administrators may create invitations.

reviewers.title: Authorization check missing for invitation creation
reviewers.description: The patch creates a new invites route but only checks membership for the requesting user. It does not verify that the user is a team administrator. Missing explicit check against admin role violates REQ-AUTH-1, which requires only team administrators to create invitations.

principal.title: Authorization check for invite creation missing admin verification
principal.description: The patch creates a new invites route that authorizes by membership existence only and does not verify that the requester has an administrator role required to create invitations, violating REQ-AUTH-1: Only team administrators may create invitations.
